PowerShell(net stop "postgresql-x64-18" /y 2>&1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; net start "postgresql-x64-18" 2>&1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; \(Get-Service "postgresql-x64-18"\).Status)
PowerShell($psql = Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL" -Recurse -Filter "psql.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; Write-Host "psql: $psql")
PowerShell(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "node|nest|npm" } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List)

PowerShell(cd D:\\FixITPro\\backend; $env:CI="false"; cmd /c "npx prisma migrate dev --name add_branch_status_and_stock_code" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem D:\\FixITPro\\web-app\\android -Recurse -Depth 6 | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Select-Object -First 60)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath 'D:\\FixITPro\\web-app\\android\\app\\build\\outputs\\apk\\dev\\debug' | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '\\.apk$' } | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\)  \($\([math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)\) MB\)  last modified: $\($_.LastWriteTime\)" })

PowerShell($cwd = Get-Location; Write-Output "CWD: $cwd"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter "app-dev-debug.apk" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime, @{N='SizeMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}})
PowerShell(\( Get-Content D:\\FixITPro\\web-app\\package.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json \).version; \( Get-Content D:\\FixITPro\\backend\\package.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json \).version)

PowerShell($f = Get-Item "D:\\FixITPro\\web-app\\android\\app\\build\\outputs\\apk\\dev\\debug\\app-dev-debug.apk"; "$\($f.Name\) โ€” $\([math]::Round\($f.Length/1MB,2\)\) MB โ€” $\($f.LastWriteTime\)")
PowerShell(if \(-not \(Test-Path D:\\FixITPro\\scripts\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path D:\\FixITPro\\scripts | Out-Null }; Write-Host "scripts dir ready")

PowerShell($androidHome = $env:ANDROID_HOME; $androidSdk = $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT; Write-Host "ANDROID_HOME: $androidHome"; Write-Host "ANDROID_SDK_ROOT: $androidSdk"; $java = Get-Command java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($java\) { Write-Host "java: $\($java.Source\)" } else { Write-Host "java: NOT FOUND" }; $adb = Get-Command adb -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($adb\) { Write-Host "adb: $\($adb.Source\)" } else { Write-Host "adb: NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Name | Select-Object -First 5; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\asus\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk"\) { "Android SDK at default path" } elseif \(Test-Path "D:\\Android\\Sdk"\) { "Android SDK at D:\\Android\\Sdk" } else { "No SDK at common paths" })

PowerShell($apk = "D:\\FixITPro\\web-app\\android\\app\\build\\outputs\\apk\\dev\\debug\\app-dev-debug.apk"; $item = Get-Item $apk; Write-Host "Path:     $\($item.FullName\)"; Write-Host "Size:     $\([math]::Round\($item.Length/1MB, 2\)\) MB"; Write-Host "Built:    $\($item.LastWriteTime\)"; $aapt = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\build-tools\\37.0.0\\aapt.exe"; if \(Test-Path $aapt\) { & $aapt dump badging $apk 2>$null | Select-String "package|label|uses-permission" | Select-Object -First 20 })
